subject: Crawdaunt, a large red crab-like creature in an aggressive stance in a watery cave or shoreline
description: A large, red crab-like creature raises its massive claws in a threatening, aggressive display. The figure has a heavily armored body, a star-shaped marking on its head, and oversized powerful claws held wide. The setting appears to be a rocky cave or shoreline with water visible, rendered in deep teal and blue tones. The creature's bold red against the dark background creates strong visual contrast. The palette is saturated red, dark teal, and deep blue.
foreground: large red armored crab-creature with raised massive claws, star marking on head
background: rocky cave or shoreline with deep teal water
